mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_ID FROM APP_MEMBER WHERE LOGIN_TYPE IS NOT NULL AND LOGIN_TYPE <> 'LOCAL'
SELECT * FROM APP_MEMBER WHERE LOWER(LOGIN_ID) = LOWER(#{loginId})

SELECT * FROM APP_MEMBER WHERE LOWER(EMAIL) = LOWER(#{email}) AND MEMBER_STATUS = 'DELETE_PENDING' AND ( (#{accountType} = 'sns' AND LOGIN_TYPE <> 'LOCAL') OR (#{accountType} = 'local' AND LOGIN_TYPE = 'LOCAL') )
SELECT * FROM APP_MEMBER WHERE LOWER(EMAIL) = #{email} AND LOGIN_TYPE = 'LOCAL' AND STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND MEMBER_STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.update: UPDATE APP_MEMBER SET STATUS = 'BLOCKED', MEMBER_STATUS = 'DELETE_PENDING', DELETE_REQUESTED_AT = SYSDATE, HARD_DELETE_AT = SYSDATE + 3, DELETE_REASON = #{deleteReason}, RECOVERY_TOKEN_HASH = #{recoveryTokenHash}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND MEMBER_STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND ROLE <> 'ADMIN'

UPDATE APP_MEMBER SET STATUS = 'ACTIVE', MEMBER_STATUS = 'ACTIVE', DELETE_REQUESTED_AT = NULL, HARD_DELETE_AT = NULL, DELETE_REASON = NULL, RECOVERY_TOKEN_HASH = NULL, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND MEMBER_STATUS = 'DELETE_PENDING' AND HARD_DELETE_AT > SYSDATE
UPDATE APP_MEMBER SET RECOVERY_TOKEN_HASH = #{recoveryTokenHash}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND MEMBER_STATUS = 'DELETE_PENDING' AND HARD_DELETE_AT > SYSDATE
UPDATE APP_MEMBER SET PASSWORD = #{password}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND MEMBER_STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE APP_MEMBER SET NICKNAME = #{nickname}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND LOGIN_TYPE <> 'LOCAL' AND MEMBER_STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE APP_MEMBER SET LAST_LOGIN_AT = #{lastLoginAt}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND MEMBER_STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
